items.title: Amazon Connect Customer now supports scheduling tasks up to 90 days in advance
items.snippet: Amazon Connect Customer now supports scheduling tasks up to 90 days in advance, helping organizations plan, route, and track long-running follow-up work. For example, an insurance team managing an auto repair claim can schedule future tasks for an adjuster…

items.title: AWS Shield Advanced introduces DDoS attack flow logs

items.snippet: AWS rebuilt Amazon OpenSearch Serverless from the ground up for agentic AI and dynamic workloads. Get instant autoscaling and up to 60% cost savings.
